All Classes

  • All Classes Interface Summary Class Summary 
    Class Description
    Main
    Main class for the Task Scheduling application.
    MinHeap<T extends java.lang.Comparable<T>>
    A generic min heap implementation for the MyPriorityQueue interface.
    MyPriorityQueue<T extends java.lang.Comparable<T>>
    Interface for a priority queue implementation.
    MyTask
    Represents a task in the task management system.
    MyUser
    Represents a user in the task management system.
    TaskManager
    Manages tasks in the system by handling users and scheduling tasks.
